candidate_llm_application_excerpt: stage-bound ensemble of hallucination detectors keyed to distinct generation failure modes; pattern of detector firings localizes post-error interval (PEI) along generation trajectory

results.note: Temporal-logic-based hallucination detection — temporal axis overlap, but Drowzee detects fact-conflicting cases, not stage-localized hallucinations across the generation trajectory
Taxonomic survey; treats categories as alternative axes not as a stage-ensemble
Repo of papers, not a method
Multi-stage frameworks discussed; not specifically stage-bound detector guilds for PEI estimation
Multi-stage cascade verification — close to ensemble framing but does not explicitly localize PEI
